title: Tea Party Invitation
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on tea party invitation within the Tea Party Invitation storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You guys can't kill me, can you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: In fact, you've been told to treat me like a delicate Frickin' flower. I'm bettin' you won't even cuff me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Remember, my wanted poster says "Only alive"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: If you kill me, someone is going to be very displeased!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The person who ensured my wanted poster says what it does...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: And the person who finalized my marriage are one and the same!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Damn it! After the ones that escaped!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Don't fucking move!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Did I not make myself clear!? Just who do you think I have at my back!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I said I'll do it! I'll go meet 'em and settle things!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Everyone, stay put!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So don't you dare lay a finger on my friends!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: What!? Father!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Right now, outside...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We're face to face with a monster.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What the hell is with this cat!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Master! You shouldn't be up and moving about yet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: 01. You. Who are you?

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Pekoms is out cold back there, covered in blood.

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: I'm one of Pekoms' friends! Truth is, we were attacked by one of Jack's remaining crewmembers!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Sanji- Kan, come out! Why are you still in there!?

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: What in the world is going on! Talk to us, Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Let's wait for Luffy and the others! Sanji! Quickly, come out here while you still can!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: This is my problem.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I promise I'll be back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Tell everyone I said hi.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: SANJIT!

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: Castle Tank!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: SANJIT!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Sanji- Kun!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Nami! Chopper!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Do you want us to chase that thing!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: No, it's useless!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Stop, Wanda- San!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Bone Baron!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Even if you were to catch up,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: He...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: He has no intention...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: There's this chick I gotta see real quick. I'll be back, I promise.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: of returning...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: An all- too-sudden parting....

summary: Tea Party Invitation: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
